entries.gameplayFunction: Core open-field terrain for economy, cavalry, and exposed settlement play.
entries.silhouetteNotes: Low-relief land with visible route and field logic.
entries.materialNotes: Grass, dry soil, old boundary traces, farm wear.
entries.generationPromptNotes: Keep readable under unit density and fog-of-war.
entries.unityImportNotes: Base terrain material family for first battlefield maps.

entries.gameplayFunction: Wet or heavily trafficked ground state near camps, roads, and battle lines.
entries.silhouetteNotes: Ruts and pooled edges read from above.
entries.materialNotes: Wet soil, wagon tracks, trampled grass.
entries.colorNotes: Brown and gray value shift, not shiny sludge.
entries.scaleNotes: Patch and spline usage around roads and camps.
entries.generationPromptNotes: Do not let mud overwhelm readability.
entries.unityImportNotes: Blend layer around wells, camps, river edges, and siege lanes.

entries.gameplayFunction: Harsh low-resource terrain and strategic buffer zones.
entries.silhouetteNotes: Cracked flats, sparse scrub, erosion channels.
entries.materialNotes: Dry clay, gravel, thin scrub cover.
entries.colorNotes: Dust, rust, clay, and pale scrub values.
entries.scaleNotes: Broad exposed ground with sparse prop support.
entries.unityImportNotes: Supports strategic buffer and stretched-march terrain.

entries.gameplayFunction: High-ground defense, choke logic, and stone-rich regions.
entries.silhouetteNotes: Clear cliff edge, walkable slope, and impassable break differentiation.
entries.materialNotes: Exposed rock, sparse grass, gravel, fractured stone.
entries.colorNotes: Cool gray to warm stone depending region.
entries.scaleNotes: Must read at both tactical and theatre scales.
entries.generationPromptNotes: Keep approach lines and chokepoints immediately legible.
entries.unityImportNotes: Needs slope mask logic and cliff-edge blending guidance.

entries.assetName: Shallow Water And River Edge Family
entries.gameplayFunction: Crossing logic, water readability, and shoreline support.
entries.visualRole: Water edge, ford, and channel distinction.
entries.silhouetteNotes: Banks and crossing shallows must read instantly.
entries.materialNotes: Wet earth, reeds, stones, shallow reflections.
entries.colorNotes: Muted water values, not mirror-heavy gloss.
entries.scaleNotes: Spline and tile set usage along channels and shores.
entries.generationPromptNotes: Emphasize movement comprehension over reflection complexity.
entries.unityImportNotes: Needed for river valleys, coastal zones, and wells adjacency.

entries.silhouetteNotes: Primary roads wider and cleaner than local paths.
entries.materialNotes: Packed dirt, stone paving, wheel wear, drainage edges.
entries.colorNotes: Slight value contrast against surrounding ground only.
entries.generationPromptNotes: Roads must be visible without becoming bright stripes.
entries.unityImportNotes: Useful for routefinding legibility and map dressing.

entries.silhouetteNotes: Rows, irrigation, boundary lines, worked soil variation.
entries.colorNotes: Seasonal crop values and managed-earth tones.
entries.scaleNotes: Supports field belts and farm adjacency.
entries.generationPromptNotes: Agricultural logic should feel economically real.
entries.unityImportNotes: Links closely with farm family and Hartvale visual lane.

entries.gameplayFunction: Ambush terrain, concealment, and movement penalty regions.
entries.silhouetteNotes: Root, brush, and wet patch reads without hiding units.
entries.materialNotes: Leaf litter, roots, damp soil, moss, reeds.
entries.colorNotes: Deep greens and browns kept value-readable.
entries.scaleNotes: Supports forest interiors and marsh edges.
entries.generationPromptNotes: Concealment should not become visual mush.
entries.unityImportNotes: Supports Wild and ancient forest lanes.

entries.gameplayFunction: Regional climate extension packs for cold and harsh maps.
entries.silhouetteNotes: Snow depth and hardpack edges remain readable from above.
entries.materialNotes: Snow, frost, permafrost, dry grit, wind-scoured rock.
entries.colorNotes: Cold whites and grays; arid ochres kept restrained.
entries.scaleNotes: Overlay and tile-set family rather than entirely separate pipeline.
entries.generationPromptNotes: Avoid bright snow glare and generic desert fantasy palette.
entries.unityImportNotes: Used when theatre map expands beyond temperate core.

entries.gameplayFunction: Clarifies node type and site wear around wood, stone, iron, and water infrastructure.
entries.silhouetteNotes: Ground cues complement the node object silhouette.
entries.materialNotes: Cut stumps, spoil heaps, wagon ruts, slag, quarry dust.
entries.scaleNotes: Localized decals and meshes around node footprints.
entries.generationPromptNotes: Help the player identify the node before zooming in.
entries.unityImportNotes: Pairs with node prefabs and raid state feedback.
